raw_consumer_statement:
Police Report ( Case # XXXX ) and FTC Identity Theft Affidavit ( Reference # XXXX ) are attached. 

From the filed police report : Subsequent to the incident outlined in Report # XXXX, there is an additional fraudulent charge of {$10000.00} on AMEX card ending XXXX. The transaction took place through XXXX and the money was sent to an individual ( XXXX XXXX - XXXX ). The transaction was categorized under 'Consulting Services ', however I never spoke to XXXX XXXX XXXX received any products or services from this person. Additionally, according to the transaction ( XXXX ), the 'Ship to " recipient is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and the address is listed as XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX Ml XXXX. The demographic information differs significantly from my own and I have no association with either this person or address. As a result, please update Report # XXXX with this XXXX credit card breach as I'm confident it is related to the original incident on XX/XX/year>. 

Reporting agency XXXX Police Department XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, WA XXXX Ph : XXXX
